results.rendered_html:
upastha a. Near, approximate.
βÄî sthaαΗΞ
1 The lap; upasthaαΙÉ kαΙ¦ to make a lap; Υösthe kαΙ¦ to take on the lap.
2 The middle part in general.
βÄî sthaαΗΞ sthaαΙÉ
1 The organ of generation (of men and women, particularly of the latter); snΡ¹naαΙÉ maunopavΡ¹sejyΡ¹svΡ¹dhyΡ¹yopasthanigrahΡ¹αΗΞ  Y. 3. 314  (male); sth≈ΪlopasthasthalΡΪαΙΘu  Bh. 1. 20  (female); hastau pΡ¹yurupastha≈¦ca  Y. 3. 92  (where the word is used in both senses).
2 The anus.
3 The haunch or hip.
Comp.
βÄî daghna a. reaching to
(pb) the lap.
βÄî nigrahaαΗΞ restraint of sensual passions, continence;  Y. 3. 314. 
βÄî patraαΗΞ, -dalaαΗΞ the Indian fig-tree (so called because its leaves resemble in shape the female organ of generation).
βÄî sad a. sitting in the lap.
